prompt: Tôi muốn dùng Khuym trong Codex cho repo này thôi. Hãy cài theo scope hợp lý nhất rồi nói bước tiếp theo để bắt đầu workflow.
expected_output: Chọn Codex, dùng template có cấu trúc rõ ràng, giải thích local marketplace flow, tách riêng install scope với repo onboarding scope, rồi handoff sang using-khuym.

assertions.text: Chooses Codex as the platform for this request.
Uses the top-level headings Chosen platform, Chosen scope, Install steps, and Bootstrap next step.
Explicitly states both install scope and repo onboarding scope.
Explains the boundary between platform install and repo onboarding.
Includes the local Codex marketplace flow or marketplace path.
Tells the user to start with using-khuym after install.
